name: Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Uretim A.S.
summary: Zorlu Enerji Elektrik √É¬úretim A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the generation, distribution, retail trade, and sale of electricity and steam in Turkey and internationally. It also sells and installs solar panels; sells and distributes natural gas; constructs, manages, and maintains EV charging stations; and constructs industrial plants. As of December 31, 2019, the company had total installed capacity of 1,086 MW comprising 305 MW of geothermal energy, 272 MW of wind energy, and 119 MW of hydroelectric energy. It operates 7 hydroelectric, 3 wind, 4 geothermal, and 3 natural gas plants in Turkey; 1 wind farm in Pakistan; and 3 natural gas power plants in Israel. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
